name: Heap Leak Detection — Diagnosed Applications
categoryDescription: Program execution evidence beyond the Uninstall/Amcache layer — BAM, SRUM, Syscache, and configuration affecting execution artifacts.
description: RADAR heap leak detection records applications flagged for memory leak issues.
forensic_value: Records applications that experienced heap leaks — occasionally captures malware that triggered heap analysis due to unusual memory usage patterns. Low individual forensic value.
